name: .windsurfrules — Modern Web App
description: Windsurf rules for React + Vite projects with modern tooling.
content:
# Windsurf Rules — Modern Web App

## Stack
- React 18 with TypeScript
- Vite for build tooling
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Tanstack Query for data
- Zustand for state

## Code Standards
- Functional components only
- Custom hooks for logic reuse
- Properly typed props and state
- Avoid any/unknown types

## File Structure
- Components: src/components/
- Pages: src/pages/
- Hooks: src/hooks/
- Stores: src/stores/
- Utils: src/lib/

## Styling
- Use Tailwind utilities
- @theme in global.css for design tokens
- Mobile-first responsive design

## Performance
- Lazy load route components
- Memoize expensive computations
- Virtualize long lists

name: .windsurfrules — Full Stack Monorepo
description: Windsurf configuration for Turborepo monorepo with shared packages.
content:
# Windsurf Rules — Monorepo

## Structure
```
apps/
  web/          # Next.js frontend
  api/          # Node.js backend
packages/
  ui/           # Shared React components
  config/       # Shared configs
  tsconfig/     # Shared TypeScript configs
```

## Workspace Commands
- `pnpm dev` — Start all apps
- `pnpm build` — Build all packages
- `pnpm test` — Run all tests

## Code Sharing
- Import from workspace: `@repo/ui`
- Share types across packages
- Centralize configs in packages/config

## Guidelines
- Keep packages focused
- Use workspace protocol
- Version packages together
